generated_oml:
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driving the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gear transmission component in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance RobotFirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot with [-90°, 90°] working range and 75°/s max speed"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, GearTransmission, CycloidalGearbox
]

instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder on motor shaft for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind gearbox for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current to permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryPositionEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance FrictionModelParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model parameters identified through deviation analysis for control algorithm adjustment"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time dashboard visualization of robot status and friction model performance"
]

instance ControlAlgorithmAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust robot control algorithm parameters based on friction model insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FrictionModelRefinementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification and refinement of white-box and black-box friction models for motion accuracy improvement"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelParameterInsight, ControlAlgorithmAdjustmentAction
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of robot motion and friction models in dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for data linking and semantic interoperability"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelRefinementService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for friction model simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelRefinementService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from sensors"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelRefinementService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard tools for real-time visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor position data from position encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance SecondaryPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Secondary position data from gearbox encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current data from sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque data computed from motor current and position measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData, MotorPositionData, SecondaryPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity from position encoder measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionData, SecondaryPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular acceleration from angular velocity data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance SysML_BlockDefinitionDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for MABI MAX 100 robot first axis structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance SysML_InternalBlockDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for MABI MAX 100 robot first axis connections"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for Coulomb and Viscous friction characteristics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for Stribeck friction effects"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for Dahl friction dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for LuGre friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No virtual-to-physical interaction; digital shadow is defined as a one-way data flow from physical to virtual only (per Kritzinger et al. [32])."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time processing of live sensor data with continuous model updates during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestration of physical robot components (motor, gearboxes, sensors), MQTT data streaming, Simulink-based processing components, and dashboard visualization, forming a one-way data flow from physical to virtual."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated); uses live data during robot operation to model friction under actual working conditions."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity assessed by comparing simulated data (from friction models) against measured reference data; deviation analysis used to refine friction models for improved accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from physical sensors to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) and SysML standards for modeling and data structure."
]
